name: ExtensionDocumentReference_RelatesTo_Code
title: R5: The relationship type with another document additional types
description: R5: `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `DocumentReference.relatesTo.code` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding.

If this document appends another document, then the document cannot be fully understood without also accessing the referenced document.
